creator: bd@tbug.org
text:
vnterm(1V) man page contains a few errors.
- "... describes only those features specific to please consult..." (specific to what?)
- "allows the X-environment ..." (program name needs to prefix)
- "With the appropriate font setting, can display ..." (missing vnterm)
- "On start-up, attempts to ..." (missing vnterm)
- "In some cases may fail to set ..." (missing vnterm)

Fix: 

- replace "allows the X-environment ..." with "vnterm allows the X-environment"
- replace "With the appropriate font setting, can display ..." with "With the appropriate font setting, vnterm can display ..."
- replace "On start-up, attempts to ..." with "On start-up, vnterm attempts to ..."
- replace "In some cases may fail to set ... " with "In some cases, vnterm may fail to set ..."
How-To-Repeat: install vnterm from /usr/ports/vietnamese/vnterm and read vnterm man page
